title: Ride-share industry has entered a ‘post-recovery' phase, but Uber can still put up solid growth, analyst says

title: Uber to cut 200 recruiters in cost-savings measure: WSJ
text: Uber Technologies Inc. UBER, +0.14% will cut about 200 recruiters in order to save costs, the Wall Street Journal reported Wednesday, citing an internal company memo. While the layoffs affect about 35% of the company's recruitment team, they account for less than 1% of Uber's headcount, the Journal reported.
